# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

This project is in **alpha** stage (Development Status :: 3 - Alpha). Only the latest release
receives security patches. No long-term support is provided for older versions.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| latest  | Yes       |
| < latest| No        |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take security seriously. If you discover a security vulnerability in Symaira EraseMe,
please report it privately.

### Preferred: GitHub Security Advisory

Go to the repository's **Security** tab and use the **Report a vulnerability** feature
to submit a private advisory. This ensures the issue is disclosed responsibly and
allows us to prepare a fix before public disclosure.

Please include:
- A description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce (if applicable)
- Potential impact
- Any suggested remediation (optional)

### What to Expect

- You will receive an acknowledgment within 72 hours.
- We will assess the report and provide an estimated timeline for a fix.
- Once resolved, we will publish a security advisory and credit the reporter
  (unless you prefer to remain anonymous).

Thank you for helping keep Symaira EraseMe and its users safe.
